changeSet.author: orbithealth
changeSet.comment: Assign AHRI demo notebooks and cloned notebook instances to their owning test sections so notebook inventory selectors can stay department-scoped.
changeSet.sql: WITH notebook_department_map(title, department_id) AS ( VALUES ('Immunology Laboratory', 59), ('Bacteriology Laboratory', 168), ('Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory', 172), ('Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab', 173), ('Bioanalytical Laboratory', 174), ('Bioequivalence Laboratory', 175), ('Pathology Laboratory', 176), ('Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory', 177), ('Pharmaceuticals Laboratory', 178), ('Viral Vaccine', 179), ('Tuberculosis Laboratory', 180), ('CTD', 181), ('Biorepository Laboratory', 182) ) INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ndm.department_id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN notebook_department_map ndm ON n.title = ndm.title OR n.title LIKE ndm.title || ' - Lab %' JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON ts.id::text = ndm.department_id::text WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id AND existing.test_section_id = ndm.department_id );

INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT child.id, parent_departments.test_section_id FROM clinlims.notebook child JOIN clinlims.notebook_departments parent_departments ON parent_departments.notebook_id = child.parent_notebook_id WHERE child.parent_notebook_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = child.id AND existing.test_section_id = parent_departments.test_section_id );

DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd USING clinlims.notebook n WHERE nd.notebook_id = n.id AND ( (n.title LIKE 'Pathology Laboratory%' AND nd.test_section_id = 163) OR (n.title LIKE 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory%' AND nd.test_section_id = 166) );
